# WhopCheckout.com

> Whop payment gateway plugin for WooCommerce — dynamic checkout from any cart total, no manual Whop plan IDs.

WhopCheckout sells a WordPress/WooCommerce plugin that connects Whop payments to online stores. Customers pay through Whop's hosted checkout; orders are confirmed via signed webhooks.

## Product

- Name: Whop Checkout (WooCommerce plugin)
- Price: $170 one-time, lifetime license
- Site: https://whopcheckout.com/
- Support: hello@whopcheckout.com

## Key features

- Dynamic Whop checkout sessions from WooCommerce cart totals
- No separate Whop plan ID per product or variant
- 5-minute setup wizard with API keys and webhook registration
- Sandbox mode and connection health dashboard
- Unlimited stores and product configurations

## Requirements

- WordPress 6+
- WooCommerce 7+
- HTTPS on production site
- Buyer's own Whop business account and API keys

## Pages

- Home / sales page: https://whopcheckout.com/
- Pricing: https://whopcheckout.com/#pricing
- FAQ: https://whopcheckout.com/#faq
- Demo video: https://whopcheckout.com/#demo
